texto: Interest in such organizations is too often linked to the fringe and marginal or thought to be little more than conspiracy theories. While such a critique is not entirely incorrect, we will see that hidden organizations are far more common, more important, and more consequential than we have typically allowed ourselves to admit. As a result, they also need to be better integrated into thinking about organizations by scholars, policymakers, and everyday citizens.
explicacao: Citação de Craig Scott sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Interest in such organizations is too often linked to the fringe and marginal or thought to be li…” articula reflexao, business, economics em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como economics e politics.
